title: Evangelion tattoo
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion tattoo             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Mon Jul 10, 2006 7:39 am I will soon have a tattoo done on my back of the second Angel as she was depicted in EoE. That, or a depiction of Rei with angelic effect(wings, etc). I present to you all this challenge: Help me to choose a good image of either of these two things, and me love you long time

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 10, 2006 8:29 am Ugh, tattoes. I'm no big supporter of those, you know. But that depends... Do you want Lilith nailed to the Cross, with legs or without, and if you want her with legs, do you want them with or without the lumps of un-needed flesh (Which disappear when she absrobes Rei), or maybe you want the giant Rei-Lilith? Be more specific. Rei with angelic characters is much easy to find. http://wildcard.geofront.com/pics/rei-angel.JPG Here's one I could find in short notice. I can run a more thorough search later.

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Mon Jul 10, 2006 8:58 am Legend of the Past wrote: maybe you want the giant Rei-Lilith? Be more specific. Rei with angelic characters is much easy to find. http://wildcard.geofront.com/pics/rei-angel.JPG Here's one I could find in short notice. I can run a more thorough search later.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 10, 2006 9:05 am Takumi Fujiwara wrote: Legend of the Past wrote: maybe you want the giant Rei-Lilith? Be more specific. Rei with angelic characters is much easy to find. http://wildcard.geofront.com/pics/rei-angel.JPG Here's one I could find in short notice. I can run a more thorough search later.

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Tue Jul 11, 2006 3:59 pm Legend of the Past wrote: Takumi Fujiwara wrote: Legend of the Past wrote: maybe you want the giant Rei-Lilith? Be more specific. Rei with angelic characters is much easy to find. http://wildcard.geofront.com/pics/rei-angel.JPG Here's one I could find in short notice. I can run a more thorough search later.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Wed Jul 12, 2006 11:21 am Not that it's eva related, but I have a tatto concept that I'm putting on my back in a few weeks.... I have a pic that I linked to the forums ages ago.... If interest peaks, il go find it.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jul 12, 2006 3:05 pm I award you with the ultimate eva fan geek award for your daring tat

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:39 pm My friend has some evangelion tatoos. he has nerv and seele on his right arm. he has 00 on his chest like on the plug suit. and a pic of uber Rei on is left arm. This also reminds me of the one time I wen tover my friends house(same as above) to go swimming and when it got dark we went into his house and we quotted eva and had eva terms all over our boddies in permanent marker. It was fun

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jul 13, 2006 1:15 am wow more info the i needed to know

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Jul 13, 2006 3:29 pm I know someone who did just that. I'd post a pic, but it's kinda rude not to ask first. The tattoo's of the famous Sadamoto piece "Giant Naked Rei and something really shiny" in red major. [url]http://img140.imageshack.us/img140/8434/dermond0615qv.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:46 am Whoa, that's awesome. Great choise for tattoo.
